title: Leave Bind!
description: LeaveBind! Lets you leave a server with a keybind
body:
# LeaveBind!

### FOR THE LATEST VERSION USE [TUTLA CLIENT](https://modrinth.com/mod/tutla-client)

*Leave a server/world with a click of a button!*
Default bind is `p`, you can configure in the keybind menu

Yes, it's really simple but effective in many cases.

---

Give a star ⭐ on [Github](https://github.com/TutlaMC/leavebind)
Join the [Discord](https://discord.tutla.net)
